tweaks.info:
Makes the whole PIM page background color change based on gender:
Unisex = Purple
Men = Blue
Women = Pink
Does not work for Kids, in this case it's the default white.
tweaks.name: Gender Colors -  Background

tweaks.info: Hides all colours that have "DO NOT USE" text in the colour dropdowns to make the list more compact and avoid mistakes.
tweaks.name: Colors - Do Not Use

tweaks.info:
Makes the sum box slightly wider for better text visibility, mostly for pre-owned or whenever theres a lot of text.
⚠️ Does not work well with the new dual sum-box. Fix this!
tweaks.name: Sum Box - Wider

tweaks.info:
Hides the Fitting phrase dropdown that appears 4 times:
1# Fitting phrase
2# Fitting phrase
etc..
tweaks.name: Fitting phrase
Fitting details

tweaks.info: Makes dropdowns bigger (taller/height) to show more items and select things faster, avoiding scrolling.
tweaks.name: Bigger dropdowns

tweaks.info: Hides info icons all over the PIM page, once you know their info they're no longer needed. This helps to declutter the page.
tweaks.name: Info icons

tweaks.info:
Hides text like:
** Required for production: Item can't be added to a slot without this information
* Required: changes cannot be submitted without this information
Just assume everything with * is required; there is no need to have this text cluttering the web page.
tweaks.name: *Required
Shipping box
Shipping constraints
What Fits in the bag
Shooting: length unit
Shooting: model info
Shooting: outfit products

tweaks.info:
Hides all unnecessary 'Additional Details' at the bottom of PIM + the big "Partner product material" at the bottom.

KEEPS:
- Item found Online
- GNS-compliant
- [FF USE ONLY] Culturally Offensive Content

HIDES:
- Luxclusif Assets Origin
- Fashion Concierge
- USPS Postal Network Scope
- PCEX ID
- Obsolete reasons
- Temporary de-publications
- Knitted fabric
- partner product material
tweaks.name: Additional Details

tweaks.info: Hides all the section titles to help declutter the page.
tweaks.name: Section tittles

tweaks.info:
Clicks the top left burger icon to hide the extra left menu.
It only works when the PIM ID product page first loads, it does not work if refreshed... yet.
tweaks.name: Auto click burguer Icon

tweaks.info: Clicks product summary expand buttons whose visible text is More.
tweaks.name: Auto Expand Sum box text

tweaks.info: Makes the space between text in the Sum Box more compact (less margins).
tweaks.name: Sum Box - Compact

tweaks.css:
@keyframes wtm-gns-composition-alert {
  0%, 100% {
    outline-color: #d32f2f;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(211, 47, 47, 0.35);
    background-color: #fff5f5;
  }

  50% {
    outline-color: #ff1744;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(255, 23, 68, 0.65);
    background-color: #ffe0e0;
  }
}

tweaks.info:
Makes GNS-compliant composition dropdown blink red when:
- Category is Shoes + the GNS-compliant composition input is empty.
- Web Category has any Men/Women shoes selected + the GNS-compliant composition input is empty.

- Not fully made to work with any kids exclusive shoe types, add those later.
tweaks.name: GNS Shoes warning

tweaks.info: Makes the DDP and Category dropdowns background colours change based on gender.
tweaks.name: Gender Colors - DDP & Category

tweaks.info: Makes the whole PIM Page more compact.
tweaks.name: Compact - Margins & Padding

tweaks.info:
Adds colour blocks in the colour dropdown next to the text names.
⚠️ "Colors - Do Not Use" must be enabled for this to work, or the colours will be wrong.
tweaks.name: Colour Dropdown

tweaks.info:
Measurement grid improvements:
- Slimmer (less wide) columns
- Replace "Does not vary by size" with "Fixed Size" and move it below the column titles.
tweaks.name: Messurement Grid - Improvements
